Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Attendance Of A Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant General Motors Llc, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-29-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF BLANCA QUIROZ' Motion To Compel Deposition Attendance Of A Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant General Motors Llc, And Request For Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Transferred to be heard on the court's discovery calendar at 9:00 a.m. on the same date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

No other appearances.
